description: Twenty street-front or drive-thru destinations teenagers want to visit. No shopping-centre food courts, no cinema levels inside Westfield — every pin is somewhere you can drive to on a real road, park, and walk in (or use a drive-thru lane).

eligibility_rules.notes: Geofences sit on the public road, forecourt, or surface car park in front of the business — never inside a mall footprint.

legal.sponsored_disclosure: Sponsored destinations are labelled in-app. Discounts are optional perks; Driveabout does not require purchases at partner sites.
legal.safety: Supervisor holds the phone. Redeem discounts only when parked — never while the learner is driving.

advertising_model.summary: Local businesses pay to be a featured Destination Drive pin. Families already driving for learner practice arrive with purchase intent — the supervisor redeems the offer, not the learner behind the wheel.

packages.name: Visit unlock coupon
includes: Unique QR or code unlocked on GPS visit

packages.name: Franchise bundle
includes: All eligible street-front locations in the play area

pitch_angles.quick_service: Drive-thru and forecourt brands capture the 'lesson reward' moment — family already in the car.
pitch_angles.franchise: Multi-site brands (Chargrill, Crystal, Messina) get one deal covering every street-front eastern-suburbs store.
pitch_angles.cinema_and_cafes: Standalone cinemas and Campbell Parade cafes reach teens where they already hang out — no mall middleman.

example_offers: Free chips with any burger plate

excluded_examples.name: Boost Juice Bondi Junction
excluded_examples.reason: Inside Westfield Bondi Junction food court — not street-front.

excluded_examples.name: Event Cinemas Bondi Junction
excluded_examples.reason: Inside Westfield — use Ritz Cinema Randwick or Entertainment Quarter Moore Park instead.

excluded_examples.name: Westfield Bondi Junction (centre-wide pin)
excluded_examples.reason: Enclosed mall; partner deals need a named street-front tenant.

excluded_examples.name: East Village Zetland
excluded_examples.reason: Enclosed shopping centre — no single street-front drive-to tenant.

excluded_examples.name: Guzman y Gomez Westfield Level 6
excluded_examples.reason: Mall branch excluded; street shop at 1A Bronte Road is eligible.

destinations.name: Krispy Kreme Mascot
destinations.teen_appeal: Hot Now light, factory outlet, drive-thru doughnuts
destinations.description: Flagship Krispy Kreme with drive-thru — reward run after a longer lesson.
destinations.supervisor_notes: Approach via Sir Reginald Ansett Drive / Ross Smith Avenue. Drive-thru only when confident with queuing.
destinations.suggested_offer: Free doughnut with any dozen (partner placeholder)
destinations.advertising_pitch: National brand, drive-thru fits learner routes; families buy by the dozen after a long practice.

destinations.name: Chargrill Charlie's Rose Bay
destinations.teen_appeal: Charcoal chicken, burgers, chips — local hangout
destinations.description: Street-front charcoal chicken on New South Head Road.
destinations.supervisor_notes: Kerbside parking on NSHR; practise legal parallel parking before walking in.
destinations.street_address: 779 New South Head Road, Rose Bay NSW 2029
destinations.suggested_offer: Free chips with any DIY plate (partner placeholder)
destinations.advertising_pitch: Franchise bundle anchor — three eastern-suburbs street sites in one deal.

destinations.name: Crystal Car Wash Rose Bay
destinations.teen_appeal: 4-minute conveyor wash — reward a good lesson with a clean car
destinations.description: NSHR forecourt wash — learner practises low-speed steering in the queue.
destinations.supervisor_notes: Follow wash-lane signage; phone away until parked in the vacuum bay.
destinations.street_address: 777 New South Head Road, Rose Bay NSW 2029
destinations.suggested_offer: $5 off a 4-minute express wash (partner placeholder)
destinations.advertising_pitch: Car-care reward ties directly to driving — natural post-lesson spend.

destinations.teen_appeal: Beach-village chicken and burgers on Dolphin Street
destinations.description: Village street-front Chargrill — calmer than Bondi strip.
destinations.supervisor_notes: Dolphin Street parking; good mid-tier coastal destination.
destinations.suggested_offer: Free chips with any DIY plate (partner placeholder)
destinations.advertising_pitch: Coastal franchise site — pairs with Coogee beach lessons.

destinations.teen_appeal: Queen Street village Chargrill — burgers and chicken plates
destinations.description: Queen Street shopfront — quiet village street, easy parking practice.
destinations.supervisor_notes: Low-speed village driving; outdoor seating popular with local teens.
destinations.suggested_offer: Free chips with any DIY plate (partner placeholder)
destinations.advertising_pitch: Third franchise site — completes harbour/inner-east Chargrill bundle.

destinations.description: Hall Street shopfront off Campbell Parade — see also Scoop Seeker collection.

destinations.advertising_pitch: High foot-traffic brand; teens choose the flavour — parents pay.

destinations.description: Standalone drive-thru off Anzac Parade — no mall, easy forecourt.

destinations.suggested_offer: Free small fries with any meal (partner placeholder)

destinations.advertising_pitch: Merivale coastal venue — destination dining after a Coogee loop.

destinations.advertising_pitch: Harbour expedition reward — families already drive to Watsons Bay for the view.
